_comment: BDP 节点先验权重 — ToMBench & SimpleToM 专属。显式ToM推理，信念/知识/情绪/意图均需精细建模。2026-04-17: tuned for weak-task MCTS routing (PST/FBT/FRT).

belief_reasoning._tuning_note: FBT: boost P/K (observation & knowledge), keep B at max. DE and A aggressively demoted to 0.05 to prevent MCTS from adding emotion_desire/action_forecast as useless tail nodes (length_bonus was inflating chain to 6 steps with these hurting FBT accuracy -8pp). Opt raised to 0.85 so chain terminates cleanly at option_filter.

intention_reasoning._tuning_note: PST (persuasion): boost U (pragmatics) and demote A (action_forecast); persuasion mechanism is pragmatic, not action-predictive.

nonliteral_reasoning._tuning_note: FRT: boost K (knowledge_state) and B (belief_state) for per-character knowledge tracking (who knows what about sensitive topic).
